# @egose/shadcn-theme

> shadcn/ui-style React component theme. Deep-import only — every module is its own subpath. All shipped modules are `"use client"`.

## Install

```
npm i @egose/shadcn-theme react react-dom react-hook-form sonner
```

Peers: react ^18.3.1 || ^19.0.0 · react-dom ^18.3.1 || ^19.0.0 · react-hook-form ^7.54.2 · sonner ^2.0.7 · tailwindcss v4 (consumer-side setup).

## Subpath map

### UI primitives — `@egose/shadcn-theme/components/ui/<name>`

`accordion` · `alert` · `alert-dialog` · `aspect-ratio` · `avatar` · `badge` · `basic-alert` · `breadcrumb` · `button` · `button-group` · `calendar` · `card` · `carousel` · `checkbox` · `collapsible` · `combobox` · `command` · `context-menu` · `copy-button` · `dialog` · `direction` · `drawer` · `dropdown-menu` · `empty` · `field` · `hover-card` · `input` · `input-group` · `input-otp` · `item` · `kbd` · `label` · `menubar` · `multi-select` · `native-select` · `navigation-menu` · `pagination` · `popover` · `progress` · `radio-group` · `resizable` · `scroll-area` · `select` · `separator` · `sheet` · `sidebar` · `skeleton` · `slider` · `sonner` · `spinner` · `switch` · `table` · `tabs` · `tag-picker` · `textarea` · `toggle` · `toggle-group` · `tooltip` · `unstyled-button` · `extension/file-input`

### Form fields (react-hook-form) — `@egose/shadcn-theme/components/form/<name>`

`checkbox` · `date-picker` · `date-range-picker` · `error` · `hook-checkbox` · `hook-date-picker` · `hook-multi-select` · `hook-native-select` · `hook-searchable-select` · `hook-select` · `hook-tag-picker` · `hook-text-input` · `hook-textarea` · `hook-time-input` · `multi-select` · `native-select` · `searchable-select` · `select` · `tag-picker` · `text-input` · `textarea` · `time-input` · `types`

### Widgets — `@egose/shadcn-theme/components/widgets/<name>`

- `action-menu` → `ActionMenu`, `ActionMenuProps`, `ActionMenuItem`
- `confirmation-dialog` → `ConfirmationDialog`, `ConfirmationDialogArgs`, `ConfirmationDialogResult`
- `content-sidebar` → `ContentSidebar`, `ContentSidebarProps`, `ContentSidebarItem`
- `dialog-manager` (and `dialog-manager/*`): `DialogProvider`, `useDialog`, `createTypedDialog`, `DialogContext`, `DialogProps`, `TypedDialogComponent`
- `image-preview-dialog` → `ImagePreviewDialog`, `ImagePreviewDialogArgs`
- `page-header` → `PageHeader`, `PageHeaderProps`
- `text-input-dialog` → `TextInputDialog`, `TextInputDialogArgs`, `TextInputDialogResult`

### Hooks — `@egose/shadcn-theme/hooks/<name>`

- `use-clipboard` → `useClipboard({ timeout? })` → `{ copied, copy, error }`
- `use-mobile` → `useIsMobile()` → `boolean`

### Utils — `@egose/shadcn-theme/utils/<name>`

- `ui` → `cn(...inputs: ClassValue[])` (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- `date` → `isEqualDate`, `isEqualDates`
- `time` → `convertToHours(value, asNumber?)` (parses `90m`, `1.5h`, `3600s`, bare numbers)

### Layouts — `@egose/shadcn-theme/layouts/<name>`

- `simple` (and `simple/*`): `SimpleLayout` (default) · `MenuItem`, `UserMenuSection` (types)
- `sidebar1` (and `sidebar1/*`): `SidebarLayout` (default) · `setLayoutHeader`, `headerStore` · `ISidebarData`, `ISidebarContext`, `INavUser`, `INavUserMenuItem`, `INavMenu`, `IMenuItem`, `IMenuSubItem`, `INavContext` (types) · `AppSidebar`, `NavUser`, `NavMenus`, `ContextSwitcher`, `ThemeSwitcher`, `LinkPlaceholder`

## Canonical patterns

```tsx
"use client";

import { Button } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/components/ui/button";
import { FormTextInput } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/components/form/text-input";
import { useClipboard } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/hooks/use-clipboard";
import { cn } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/utils/ui";
import SimpleLayout from "@egose/shadcn-theme/layouts/simple";

export function Demo() {
  const { copy, copied } = useClipboard();
  return (
    <SimpleLayout aslink={Link} left={{ menus: [{ label: "Home", link: "/" }] }}>
      <Button variant="primary" loading={copied} onClick={() => copy("hi")}>
        {copied ? "Copied" : "Copy"}
      </Button>
      <FormTextInput name="title" label="Title" required />
    </SimpleLayout>
  );
}
```

Promise-based dialog flow:

```tsx
"use client";
import { DialogProvider, useDialog, createTypedDialog } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/components/widgets/dialog-manager";
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogFooter, Button } from "@egose/shadcn-theme/components/ui/dialog";

const ConfirmDialog = createTypedDialog<{ title: string }, boolean>(
  ({ open, args, onClose }) => (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={(o) => !o && onClose(false)}>
      <DialogContent>
        {args.title}
        <DialogFooter>
          <Button variant="ghost" onClick={() => onClose(false)}>Cancel</Button>
          <Button variant="danger" onClick={() => onClose(true)}>Confirm</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  ),
);

// inside a component under <DialogProvider>:
// const ok = await openDialog(ConfirmDialog, { title: "Delete?" });
```

## Notable conventions

- All shipped modules start with `"use client";` — only import from client components / pages.
- `Button` accepts `variant`, `size`, `appearance`, `loading`, `icon`, `iconPosition`; see `buttonVariants` for the resolved class string.
- Form-field wrappers (`components/form/text-input`, `select`, `checkbox`, `date-picker`, `textarea`, …) compose with `react-hook-form` via `inputProps={{ ...register('name', rules) }}`. `HookFormRules<T>` (in `components/form/types`) is the safe `RegisterOptions` subset.
- Layout `aslink` prop is required — pass your router's `Link` (works for both `to=` and `href=` APIs).
- `cn` is the single point for class composition; pass `classNames` slots on layouts/form-fields to extend (never override) defaults.
